stages.concept:
# Unit 072: 독립부정사 - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **독립부정사**에 대해 배워볼까요?

> **To be honest**, I don't like this movie.
> 솔직히 말하면, 나는 이 영화가 좋지 않다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 독립부정사는 문장 전체를 꾸며주는 **관용적 표현**이에요. 문장 앞에 주로 쓰여요.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 자주 쓰이는 독립부정사를 살펴볼까요?

> **To tell the truth** — 사실을 말하면
> **To tell the truth**, I was scared.
> 사실을 말하면, 나는 무서웠다.

> **To be honest** — 솔직히 말하면
> **To be honest**, I forgot your birthday.
> 솔직히 말하면, 네 생일을 잊어버렸어.

> **To begin with** — 우선, 먼저
> **To begin with**, let's review the rules.
> 우선, 규칙을 복습합시다.

**Q. 다음 중 '사실을 말하면' 이라는 뜻을 가진 독립부정사는 무엇인가요?**
1. To tell the truth ✅
2. To begin with
3. To make matters worse

> **To make matters worse** — 설상가상으로
> **To make matters worse**, it started to rain.
> 설상가상으로, 비가 오기 시작했다.

> **So to speak** — 말하자면
> He is, **so to speak**, a walking dictionary.
> 그는, 말하자면, 걸어 다니는 사전이다.

> **To be sure** — 확실히
> **To be sure**, he is talented.
> 확실히, 그는 재능이 있다.

🧑‍🎓 학생: 독립부정사는 관용 표현으로 외워두면 되는 거군요! to be honest, to tell the truth, to begin with 등!
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 072: 독립부정사 - 연습문제 A

**01.** 우리말에 맞게 보기 중 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
사실대로 말하자면, 난 너한테 거짓말을 했어.
(     ) , I lied to you.
> **정답** To tell the truth

---

**02.** 솔직히 말하면, 이 영화는 재미없다.
(     ) , this movie is boring.
> **정답** To be honest

---

**03.** 말하자면, 그것은 기적이었다.
(     ) , it was a miracle.
> **정답** So to speak

---

**04.** 우선, 너의 숙제를 끝내라.
(     ) , finish your homework.
> **정답** To begin with

---

**05.** 확실히 말하면, 그는 올 수 없다.
(     ) , he can't come.
> **정답** To be sure

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
To be honestly, I don't like this food.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** honestly → honest

---

**07.** To telling the truth, I was scared.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** telling → tell

---

**08.** To began with, let me explain the plan.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** began → begin

---

**09.** So to speaking, he is a genius.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** speaking → speak

---

**10.** To be honestly, she didn't study at all.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** honestly → honest

---

**11.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
사실대로 말하면, 나는 그것을 깨뜨렸다.
, I broke it.
> **정답** To tell the truth

---

**12.** 솔직히 말하면, 이 음식은 맛이 없다.
, this food is not tasty.
> **정답** To be honest

---

**13.** 우선, 자기소개를 하자.
, let's introduce ourselves.
> **정답** To begin with

---

**14.** 말하자면, 그녀는 천재이다.
, she is a genius.
> **정답** So to speak

---

**15.** 확실히 말하면, 그것은 사실이다.
, it is true.
> **정답** To be sure

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
솔직히 말하면, 나는 그를 좋아하지 않는다.
To honest be I don't like him
> **정답** To / be / honest / I / don't / like / him

---

**17.** 사실대로 말하면, 나는 시험 공부를 하지 않았다.
To the truth tell I didn't study for the test
> **정답** To / tell / the / truth / I / didn't / study / for / the / test

---

**18.** 우선, 규칙을 설명하겠다.
To with begin let me explain the rules
> **정답** To / begin / with / let / me / explain / the / rules

---

**19.** 말하자면, 그는 우리 팀의 리더이다.
So speak to he is the leader of our team
> **정답** So / to / speak / he / is / the / leader / of / our / team

---

**20.** 솔직히 말해서, 나는 그 계획에 동의하지 않는다.
To be honest I don't agree with the plan
> **정답** To / be / honest / I / don't / agree / with / the / plan
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 072: 독립부정사 - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
To tell the truth, I don't really enjoy watching
movies.
To make a long story short, Amy quit the job.
Strange to saying I had dreams about you.
To make matters worse, it began raining.
> **정답** Strange to saying I had dreams about you.

---

**02.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
To make a long story short, he left his country.
Beginning with, let's talk about the problems.
To begin with, I want to thank you all for
inviting me here.
So to speak, it was all your fault.
> **정답** Beginning with, let's talk about the problems.

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말을 고르시오.
솔직히 말해서, 나는 그를 좋아하지 않는다.
_________________, I don't like him.
To make matters worse
To be sure
To begin with
To be frank
> **정답** To be frank

---

**04.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말을 고르시오.
이상한 얘기지만, Amy는 그녀의 모든 교과서를 잃어버렸다.
__________________, Amy lost all her textbooks.
Needless to say
Strange to say
So to speak
To be frank
> **정답** Strange to say

---

**05.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
사실대로 말하자면, 나는 Amy가 예쁘다고 생각한다.
________________________, I think Amy is pretty.
To make a long story short
To tell the truth
So to speak
To make matters worse
> **정답** To tell the truth

---

**06.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
To begin with, Amy has the right answer.
To making matters worse, my car has
disappeared.
Being honest, I prefer having lunch with Tom.
Strangely to say, I think I saw you on the
scene.
> **정답** To begin with, Amy has the right answer.

---

**07.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
So to speak, they are not the same thing.
Be frank, I've never attended any meeting.
Telling the truth, I lied to you the other day.
Strange to saying, my phones rings at 2 p.m.
every day.
> **정답** So to speak, they are not the same thing.

---

**08.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
사실을 말하자면, 내가 네 우산을 가져갔어.
To tell the truth, I took your umbrella.
Tell the truth, I took your umbrella.
To be told the truth, I took your umbrella.
Telling the truth, I took your umbrella.
> **정답** To tell the truth, I took your umbrella.

---

**09.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
이상한 얘기지만, 넌 내 쌍둥이 자매 같아.
Strange to saying, you are like my twin sister.
Strange saying, you are like my twin sister.
Strange to say, you are like my twin sister.
Strangely to say, you are like my twin sister.
> **정답** Strange to say, you are like my twin sister.

---

**10.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
설상가상으로, Amy는 그녀의 핸드폰마저 잃어버렸다.
Making matters worse, Amy lost her cell
phone.
To making matters worse, Amy lost her cell
phone.
Make matters worse, Amy lost her cell
phone.
To make matters worse, Amy lost her cell
phone.
> **정답** To make matters worse, Amy lost her cell phone.

---

**11.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
To be frank with you, I don't like the way you
speak.
Strange to saying, I keep forgetting his name.
To begin with, we should try to understand
the facts.
To make matters worse, Amy got lost in the
forest.
> **정답** Strange to saying, I keep forgetting his name.

---

**12.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
To make a long story short, they decided to
get married this year.
To tell the truth, Amy and I ate the whole
cake.
To be frankly, I think mine is better than hers.
My daughter is the reason for my life, so to
speak.
> **정답** To be frankly, I think mine is better than hers.

---

**13.** 주어진 우리 말을 영작할 때, 틀린 곳을 찾아 바르게 고쳐
쓰시오.
너에게 솔직하자면, 난 너를 도와줄 시간이 많이 없어.
To being frank with you, I don't have much time to
help you.
틀린곳 → 정답
> **정답** being, be

---

**14.** 주어진 우리 말을 영작할 때, 틀린 곳을 찾아 바르게 고쳐
쓰시오.
말하자면 Amy는 Tom 편이야.
Amy is on Tom's side, so speaking.
틀린곳 → 정답
> **정답** speaking, to speak

---

**15.** 주어진 우리 말을 영작할 때, 틀린 곳을 찾아 바르게 고쳐
쓰시오.
설상가상으로, 그는 그 시험에서 큰 실수를 했다.
To be made matters worse, he made a huge
mistake on the exam.
틀린곳 → 정답
> **정답** be made, make

---

**16.** 주어진 우리 말을 영작할 때, 틀린 곳을 찾아 바르게 고쳐
쓰시오.
확실히, 이것은 내가 좋아하는 책이 아니다.
To be surely, this is not my favorite book.
틀린곳 → 정답
> **정답** surely, sure

---

**17.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
To begin in, you should follow
the school rules.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** in, → with

---

**18.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
To write a long story short,
Amy and Tom canceled their
wedding.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** write → make

---

**19.** 문장에서 틀린부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐 쓰세요.
Needless to saying, I will come
with you.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** saying, → say

---

**20.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
So to speaking, he is a
genius.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** speaking, → speak
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 072 독립부정사중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 우리말에 맞게 문장을 완성하시오.
말하자면 우리는 진짜 친구이다.
  (     )   (     ) , we are real friends.
정답 So, to, speak

---

**02.** 우리말에 맞게 문장을 완성하시오.
설상가상으로 Amy는 그녀의 안경마저 잃어버렸다.
  (     )   (     )   (     ) , Amy lost her
glasses.
정답 To, make, matters, worse

---

**03.** 우리말에 맞게 문장을 완성하시오.
우선, 정보를 공유해보자.
  (     )   (     ) , let's share information.
정답 To, begin, with

---

**04.** 어법상 어색한 부분을 찾아 고쳐 쓰시오.
Telling the truth, I wore your skirt yesterday.
→  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) , I wore your skirt
yesterday.
정답 To, tell, the, truth

---

**05.** 어법상 어색한 부분을 찾아 고쳐 쓰시오.
To be made a long story short, Naomi joined the
cheerleaders.
→  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) ,
Naomi joined the cheerleaders.
정답 To, make, a, long, story, short

---

**06.** 어법상 어색한 부분을 찾아 고쳐 쓰시오.
Telling the truth, I don't like your painting.
→  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) , I don't like your
painting.
정답 To, tell, the, truth

---

**07.** 우리말에 알맞게 문장을 완성하시오.
솔직히 말해서, 나는 학교 버스를 놓쳤다.
  (     )   (     ) , I missed the school bus.
정답 To, be, frank

---

**08.** 우리말에 알맞게 문장을 완성하시오.
간단히 말하자면, 그 영화는 내 타입이 아니야.
  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) , the
movie is not my type.
정답 To, make, a, long, story, short

---

**09.** 우리말에 알맞게 문장을 완성하시오.
말할 필요도 없이, 한국은 위대한 나라이다.
  (     )   (     ) , Korea is a great country.
정답 Needless, to, say

---

**10.** 우리말에 알맞게 문장을 완성하시오.
이상한 이야기지만, 저는 텔레비전을 별로 좋아하지 않는
다.
  (     )   (     ) , I don’t really enjoy television.
정답 Strange, to, say

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 072: 독립부정사 - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
To tell the truth, I don't really enjoy watching dramas.
To make a long story short, Tom quit the job.
Strange to saying I had dreams about you.
To make matters worse, it began snowing.
> 정답: Strange to saying I had dreams about you.

---

**02.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
To make a long story short, he left his town.
Beginning with, let's talk about the issues.
To begin with, I want to thank you all for inviting me here.
So to speak, it was all your fault.
> 정답: Beginning with, let's talk about the issues.

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말을 고르시오.
솔직히 말해서, 나는 그녀를 좋아하지 않는다. _________________, I don't like her.
To make matters worse To be sure To begin with To be frank
> 정답: To be frank

---

**04.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말을 고르시오.
이상한 얘기지만, Tom은 그의 모든 노트를 잃어버렸다. __________________, Tom lost all his notebooks.
Needless to say Strange to say So to speak To be frank
> 정답: Strange to say

---

**05.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
사실대로 말하자면, 나는 Amy가 착하다고 생각한다. ________________________, I think Amy is kind.
To make a long story short To tell the truth So to speak To make matters worse
> 정답: To tell the truth

---

**06.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
To begin with, Tom has the right answer.
To making matters worse, my bike has disappeared.
Being honest, I prefer having lunch with Amy.
Strangely to say, I think I saw you on the scene.
> 정답: To begin with, Tom has the right answer.

---

**07.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
So to speak, they are not the same thing.
Be frank, I've never attended any class.
Telling the truth, I lied to you the other day.
Strange to saying, my alarm rings at 6 a.m. every day.
> 정답: So to speak, they are not the same thing.

---

**08.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
사실을 말하자면, 내가 네 책을 가져갔어.
To tell the truth, I took your book.
Tell the truth, I took your book.
To be told the truth, I took your book.
Telling the truth, I took your book.
> 정답: To tell the truth, I took your book.

---

**09.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
이상한 얘기지만, 넌 내 사촌 같아.
Strange to saying, you are like my cousin.
Strange saying, you are like my cousin.
Strange to say, you are like my cousin.
Strangely to say, you are like my cousin.
> 정답: Strange to say, you are like my cousin.

---

**10.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
설상가상으로, Amy는 그녀의 지갑마저 잃어버렸다.
Making matters worse, Amy lost her wallet.
To making matters worse, Amy lost her wallet.
Make matters worse, Amy lost her wallet.
To make matters worse, Amy lost her wallet.
> 정답: To make matters worse, Amy lost her wallet.

---

**11.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
To be frank with you, I don't like the way you talk.
Strange to saying, I keep forgetting her name.
To begin with, we should try to understand the facts.
To make matters worse, Tom got lost in the city.
> 정답: Strange to saying, I keep forgetting her name.

---

**12.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
To make a long story short, they decided to move this year.
To tell the truth, Tom and I ate the whole pie.
To be frankly, I think mine is better than his.
My son is the reason for my joy, so to speak.
> 정답: To be frankly, I think mine is better than his.

---

**13.** 주어진 우리 말을 영작할 때, 틀린 곳을 찾아 바르게 고쳐 쓰시오.
너에게 솔직하자면, 난 너를 도와줄 시간이 많이 없어.
To being frank with you, I don't have much time to help you. 틀린곳 > 정답:

---

**14.** 주어진 우리 말을 영작할 때, 틀린 곳을 찾아 바르게 고쳐 쓰시오.
말하자면 Tom은 Amy 편이야.
Tom is on Amy's side, so speaking. 틀린곳 > 정답:
